name: Real Incident Multi-Label Classifier
task: Multi-label classification of confirmed cyber incident narratives
algorithm: TF-IDF word/character features + one-vs-rest SGD logistic regression + validation calibration
limitations: The training corpus contains confirmed incident narratives rather than genuine benign operational records.
Performance is an internal chronological holdout result, not independent external validation.
Rare labels have limited evidence and are conservatively thresholded.
Model evidence is not proof of causation.
